text:
>Number:         178631
>Category:       ports
>Synopsis:       [PATCH] add in portscout limit for print/cups-base
>Confidential:   no
>Severity:       non-critical
>Priority:       low
>Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>State:          open
>Quarter:        
>Keywords:       
>Date-Required:
>Class:          maintainer-update
>Submitter-Id:   current-users
>Arrival-Date:   Tue May 14 16:00:00 UTC 2013
>Closed-Date:
>Last-Modified:
>Originator:     Chris Petrik
>Release:        
>Organization:
NA
>Environment:
>Description:
Add in portscout limit to block the appearance of a 1.6.2 update for the time being.
>How-To-Repeat:

>Fix:

Index: cups-base/Makefile
===================================================================
--- cups-base/Makefile	(revision 318163)
+++ cups-base/Makefile	(working copy)
@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@
 
 UNIQUENAME=	${PORTNAME}${PKGNAMESUFFIX}
 
+PORTSCOUT=      limit:^1\.5\.4
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes


>Release-Note:
>Audit-Trail:
>Unformatted:
